name: Multi-Grain Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine boiling water with bulgur wheat, millet, corn syrup, and oil.
2. Cool the mixture to room temperature.
3. Bring all remaining ingredients to room temperature.
4. Pour the cooled ingredients into a bread machine in order.
5. Add the grain mixture.
6. Set the baking control to medium.
7. Select white bread and press Start.
